title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 05 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 05/10/2021
Image reference: 2021-10-05_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-05-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Modern LR1 values have firmed. Suezmax Nordic Sirius (150,200 DWT, Oct 2000, NKK) sold to Far Eastern buyers for USD 14.00 mil, VV value USD 13.99 mil - BWTS Fitted. MR2 Stena Conqueror (47,300 DWT, Oct 2003, Uljanik Brodogradiliste) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 6.90 mil, VV value USD 7.78 mil - DD Due.
